name: Balthazar Valls-Sanchis
summary: Motivated Junior Data Analyst with a strong foundation in statistical analysis and database management. Eager to leverage technical skills in SQL and Python to drive data-informed decision-making within a dynamic team environment.

experience.title: Data Analyst Intern

experience.title: Junior Research Assistant
experience.description: Conducted quantitative research on regional market trends using R and Excel. Managed internal databases and performed data validation tasks to ensure report accuracy.

experience.title: Customer Support Analyst
